TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I tini i sawaliay a 'apilis no Yu - Shan hananay, oya satakaraway a lotok no Taywan i, adihay ko sa'owac. I tini i saetipay a tafiling no pasawali a lotok i, matira to a adihay ko sa'owac. Saka ma- sopsop ko nanom no nani waliay ato nani etipay a kalosa'owa'owac i, mala- sawa'eran no Siwkulan hananay a tara- wadaw. I tini i la'ed no Posko ato Kohkoh i, masadafdaf ko sera i tira, saka masaca- pacapa' ko sonol no nanom i tira. O ka- olahan no kapah no i lilisay no Tarawa- daw a niyaroaro' a mikomoris a mifuting i tira tora kasacapacapa' no tarawadaw i tiyaho. Roma i, satatad san ko cecay na- niyaro'an a cilowad to komoris. Roma i, malaladof ko pina- pina:ay a niyaro' a ci- lowad to komoris. Caay ko pifuting aca a cecay ko pato- sokan a mikomoris, o sa- pipalatamdawaw to kapah ko sakakaay a patosokan no i tiraay a Pangcah. I tini i cepo' no fadangaw hananay a sa'owac i sawalian no Kohkoh i, pasa- wali a mapiko ko likid no nanom. I tira a miteka mifalat a miketon to lotok no pa- sawali tangasa i cepo' no nini a Tarawa- daw i pariyar. Adihay ko kahirahira no futing i nanom no tarawadaw, saka ka- olahan no pangcah a mifuting i tira. I tira saca i cepo' no nini a tarawadaw misa- cepo' a mifuting ko niyaro' no Maku- taay. Anini sato, onini a Siwkulan ha- nanay a tarawadaw i, caayto ko pifu- tingan no Pangcah a cecay. O ka- olahan to no i cowacowaay a lafang a mikihadoy to tata'akay a dadangoyan nani tini i Kohkoh tangasa i cepo'.
S.PHON: i tini i sawa…ĺiaj a °api…ĺis no~u jo~u~u - sńßan ńßananaj, o~uja satakarawaj a …ĺo~uto~uk no~u tajwan i, a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u sa °o~uwa ¶. i tini i sa…ôtipaj a tafi…ĺiŇč no~u pasawa…ĺi a …ĺo~uto~uk i, matira to~u a a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u sa °o~uwa ¶. saka ma- so~upso~up ko~u nano~um no~u nani wa…ĺiaj ato~u nani …ôtipaj a ka…ĺo~usa °o~uwa °o~uwa ¶ i, ma…ĺa- sawa °…ôran no~u siwko~u~u…ĺan ńßananaj a tara- wa…¨~…ģaw. i tini i …ĺa °…ô…¨~…ģ no~u po~usko~u ato~u ko~uńßko~uńß i, masa…¨~…ģaf…¨~…ģaf ko~u s…ôra i tira, saka masa ¶a- pa ¶apa ° ko~u so~uno~u…ĺ no~u nano~um i tira. o~u ka- o~u…ĺańßan no~u kapańß no~u i …ĺi…ĺisaj no~u tarawa- …¨~…ģaw a nijaro~uaro~u ° a miko~umo~uris a mifo~u~utiŇč i tira to~ura kasa ¶apa ¶apa ° no~u tarawa…¨~…ģaw i tijańßo~u. ro~uma i, satata…¨~…ģ san ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj na- nijaro~u °an a ¶i…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u ko~umo~uris. ro~uma i, ma…ĺa…ĺa…¨~…ģo~uf ko~u pina- pina:aj a nijaro~u ° a ¶i- …ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u ko~umo~uris. ¶aaj ko~u pifo~u~utiŇč a ¶a a ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u pato~u- so~ukan a miko~umo~uris, o~u sa- pipa…ĺatam…¨~…ģawaw to~u kapańß ko~u sakakaaj a pato~uso~ukan no~u i tiraaj a paŇč ¶ańß. i tini i ¶…ôpo~u ° no~u fa…¨~…ģaŇčaw ńßananaj a sa °o~uwa ¶ i sawa…ĺian no~u ko~uńßko~uńß i, pasa- wa…ĺi a mapiko~u ko~u …ĺiki…¨~…ģ no~u nano~um. i tira a mit…ôka mifa…ĺat a mik…ôto~un to~u …ĺo~uto~uk no~u pa- sawa…ĺi taŇčasa i ¶…ôpo~u ° no~u nini a tarawa- …¨~…ģaw i parijar. a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u kańßirańßira no~u fo~u~utiŇč i nano~um no~u tarawa…¨~…ģaw, saka ka- o~u…ĺańßan no~u paŇč ¶ańß a mifo~u~utiŇč i tira. i tira sa ¶a i ¶…ôpo~u ° no~u nini a tarawa…¨~…ģaw misa- ¶…ôpo~u ° a mifo~u~utiŇč ko~u nijaro~u ° no~u mako~u~u- taaj. anini sato~u, o~unini a siwko~u~u…ĺan ńßa- nanaj a tarawa…¨~…ģaw i, ¶aajto~u ko~u pifo~u~u- tiŇčan no~u paŇč ¶ańß a ¶…ô ¶aj. o~u ka- o~u…ĺańßan to~u no~u i ¶o~uwa ¶o~uwaaj a …ĺafaŇč a mikińßa…¨~…ģo~uj to~u tata °akaj a …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaŇčo~ujan nani tini i ko~uńßko~uńß taŇčasa i ¶…ôpo~u °.
S.FORM: I tini i sawaliay a 'apilis no Yu - Shan hananay, oya satakaraway a lotok no Taywan i, adihay ko sa'owac. I tini i saetipay a tafiling no pasawali a lotok i, matira to a adihay ko sa'owac. Saka ma- sopsop ko nanom no nani waliay ato nani etipay a kalosa'owa'owac i, mala- sawa'eran no Siwkulan hananay a tara- wadaw. I tini i la'ed no Posko ato Kohkoh i, masadafdaf ko sera i tira, saka masaca- pacapa' ko sonol no nanom i tira. O ka- olahan no kapah no i lilisay no Tarawa- daw a niyaroaro' a mikomoris a mifuting i tira tora kasacapacapa' no tarawadaw i tiyaho. Roma i, satatad san ko cecay na- niyaro'an a cilowad to komoris. Roma i, malaladof ko pina- pina:ay a niyaro' a ci- lowad to komoris. Caay ko pifuting aca a cecay ko pato- sokan a mikomoris, o sa- pipalatamdawaw to kapah ko sakakaay a patosokan no i tiraay a Pangcah. I tini i cepo' no fadangaw hananay a sa'owac i sawalian no Kohkoh i, pasa- wali a mapiko ko likid no nanom. I tira a miteka mifalat a miketon to lotok no pa- sawali tangasa i cepo' no nini a Tarawa- daw i pariyar. Adihay ko kahirahira no futing i nanom no tarawadaw, saka ka- olahan no pangcah a mifuting i tira. I tira saca i cepo' no nini a tarawadaw misa- cepo' a mifuting ko niyaro' no Maku- taay. Anini sato, onini a Siwkulan ha- nanay a tarawadaw i, caayto ko pifu- tingan no Pangcah a cecay. O ka- olahan to no i cowacowaay a lafang a mikihadoy to tata'akay a dadangoyan nani tini i Kohkoh tangasa i cepo'.
S.PHON: i tini i sawa…ĺiaj a °api…ĺis no~u jo~u~u - sńßan ńßananaj, o~uja satakarawaj a …ĺo~uto~uk no~u tajwan i, a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u sa °o~uwa ¶. i tini i sa…ôtipaj a tafi…ĺiŇč no~u pasawa…ĺi a …ĺo~uto~uk i, matira to~u a a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u sa °o~uwa ¶. saka ma- so~upso~up ko~u nano~um no~u nani wa…ĺiaj ato~u nani …ôtipaj a ka…ĺo~usa °o~uwa °o~uwa ¶ i, ma…ĺa- sawa °…ôran no~u siwko~u~u…ĺan ńßananaj a tara- wa…¨~…ģaw. i tini i …ĺa °…ô…¨~…ģ no~u po~usko~u ato~u ko~uńßko~uńß i, masa…¨~…ģaf…¨~…ģaf ko~u s…ôra i tira, saka masa ¶a- pa ¶apa ° ko~u so~uno~u…ĺ no~u nano~um i tira. o~u ka- o~u…ĺańßan no~u kapańß no~u i …ĺi…ĺisaj no~u tarawa- …¨~…ģaw a nijaro~uaro~u ° a miko~umo~uris a mifo~u~utiŇč i tira to~ura kasa ¶apa ¶apa ° no~u tarawa…¨~…ģaw i tijańßo~u. ro~uma i, satata…¨~…ģ san ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj na- nijaro~u °an a ¶i…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u ko~umo~uris. ro~uma i, ma…ĺa…ĺa…¨~…ģo~uf ko~u pina- pina:aj a nijaro~u ° a ¶i- …ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u ko~umo~uris. ¶aaj ko~u pifo~u~utiŇč a ¶a a ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u pato~u- so~ukan a miko~umo~uris, o~u sa- pipa…ĺatam…¨~…ģawaw to~u kapańß ko~u sakakaaj a pato~uso~ukan no~u i tiraaj a paŇč ¶ańß. i tini i ¶…ôpo~u ° no~u fa…¨~…ģaŇčaw ńßananaj a sa °o~uwa ¶ i sawa…ĺian no~u ko~uńßko~uńß i, pasa- wa…ĺi a mapiko~u ko~u …ĺiki…¨~…ģ no~u nano~um. i tira a mit…ôka mifa…ĺat a mik…ôto~un to~u …ĺo~uto~uk no~u pa- sawa…ĺi taŇčasa i ¶…ôpo~u ° no~u nini a tarawa- …¨~…ģaw i parijar. a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u kańßirańßira no~u fo~u~utiŇč i nano~um no~u tarawa…¨~…ģaw, saka ka- o~u…ĺańßan no~u paŇč ¶ańß a mifo~u~utiŇč i tira. i tira sa ¶a i ¶…ôpo~u ° no~u nini a tarawa…¨~…ģaw misa- ¶…ôpo~u ° a mifo~u~utiŇč ko~u nijaro~u ° no~u mako~u~u- taaj. anini sato~u, o~unini a siwko~u~u…ĺan ńßa- nanaj a tarawa…¨~…ģaw i, ¶aajto~u ko~u pifo~u~u- tiŇčan no~u paŇč ¶ańß a ¶…ô ¶aj. o~u ka- o~u…ĺańßan to~u no~u i ¶o~uwa ¶o~uwaaj a …ĺafaŇč a mikińßa…¨~…ģo~uj to~u tata °akaj a …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaŇčo~ujan nani tini i ko~uńßko~uńß taŇčasa i ¶…ôpo~u °.
